title: Check 2: Document Validity — Dates & Timings Only — Result
description: Output of Check 2. Verifies document dates and date ranges only: quote date vs PR date, quote validity/expiry, contract effective/expiry, delivery period. No supplier/currency/total match here — those are in other checks. Ref: PR_Compliance_Check1_Check2_Fields.md §2 (date rules only).

check_2_status.description: Overall result. PASS = all date/timing rules pass; FAIL = e.g. expired quote, quote date after PR date; NEEDS_REVIEW = e.g. expiration approaching.

summary_description.description: Short summary for UI (e.g. 'All dates and timings valid').

quote_staleness_warning.description: True if quote is stale per policy (e.g. > 60 days).

contract_validity.description: Contract date/timing rules when contract is attached or referenced.

covers_delivery_period_warning.description: True if contract may expire before PR need_by_date.

near_expiry_warning.description: True if contract expires soon (e.g. within 30/60/90 days).

sub_checks.description: For UI: e.g. Quote date before PR date; Quote not expired; Contract effective/not expired.

field_level_assessment.description: For UI: Quote Date, Quote Expiration, Contract Effective/Expiry, etc.

policy_reference.description: e.g. Procurement Policy v3.2, Section 3.2 (dates & timings).

agent_recommendation.description: Optional recommendation when NEEDS_REVIEW or FAIL (e.g. refresh quote, extend contract).

example.summary_description: All document dates and timings valid; quote and contract in effect for PR date.

sub_checks.name: Quote date on or before PR date
Quote not expired as of PR date
